en.title: **Cloud DevOps Engineer**
en.info: Zintellix™ · Internship · Jaipur, Rajasthan, India · On-site
en.text: Serving as the primary Cloud DevOps Engineer in a small product team, owning end-to-end cloud and DevOps delivery. Managing Git/GitHub workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and production deployments across AWS and Azure with a strong focus on secure, repeatable release practices. Partnering closely with developers to improve deployment reliability, incident readiness, and overall release confidence.

en.title: **DevOps Engineer**
en.info: L&T EduTech · Trainee · Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India · On-site
en.text: Completed structured DevOps and cloud training with hands-on implementation of Linux administration, automation workflows, and CI/CD delivery pipelines. Built a strong engineering foundation in cloud resource management, monitoring, troubleshooting, and reliability-focused operations. This role established disciplined execution for production-ready DevOps practices.

en.title: **Full Stack Development**
en.info: Zeetron Networks Pvt. Ltd. India · Internship · Jaipur, Rajasthan, India · Remote
en.text: Contributed to building and maintaining web application modules with backend API integration and collaborative feature delivery. Strengthened execution in structured sprint workflows, version-controlled releases, and production-minded quality practices. This internship improved cross-functional communication and delivery discipline for real project environments.
